docs.title: Digital Linguistics Playbook
docs.text: Welcome to Damjan's chamber of digital secrets. Please use the navigation bar on the left or the search function. Didn't find what you were looking for? Give us a shout at damjan@posteo.de.

docs.title: About
docs.text: Who we are.

docs.title: Howto
docs.text: Videos and guidelines on how to do digital magic.

docs.title: Scenarios
docs.text: This page offers a number of scenarios in which young, aspiring digital linguists might find themselves, with possible solutions, links and tips.

docs.title: Audio
docs.text: Welcome to the toolkit. Please have a look around on the left or use the search function.

docs.title: Automation
docs.text: Welcome to the toolkit. Please have a look around on the left or use the search function.

docs.title: Custom stop word list for spaCy
docs.text:
When to use Improve NLP preprocessing.

Input Corpus

Tools spaCy

Steps Build frequency list ▸ Manual prune ▸ update(set)

Output stopwords.json

Pro tip

Maintain per‑domain lists.

docs.title: CAT Tools
docs.text: Welcome to the toolkit. Please have a look around on the left or use the search function.

docs.title: Importing termbases into memoQ
docs.text:
When to use Enable term recognition in translation grid.

Input *.tbx or *.csv

Tools memoQ

Steps Resources ▸ Termbases ▸ Import ▸ Map languages

Output Active termbase

Pro tip

Set deprecated terms to “Forbidden”.

docs.title: Batch converting subtitle formats with Subtitle Edit
docs.text:
When to use Need SRT, VTT, ASS in one go.

Input Master *.srt

Tools Subtitle Edit

Steps Select files ▸ Choose target formats ▸ Run

Output Multiple subtitle files

Pro tip

Enable “Maintain time‑codes”.

docs.title: Auto timestamp video with Whisper
docs.text:
When to use Generate Spanish subs from scratch.

Input video.mp4

Tools Subtitle Edit, Whisper

Steps Load video ▸ Choose model ▸ Generate

Output Timed Spanish SRT

Pro tip

GPU speeds up the process significantly, ~70 %.

docs.title: _Standardise_project_file_naming
docs.text:
When to use Ensure reproducible pipelines.

Input Mixed files

Tools Bulk Rename Utility

Steps Regex: {code}_{lang}_{ver}.ext

Output Consistent names

Pro tip

Describe pattern in README.

docs.title: _Align_bilingual_docs_with_LF_Aligner
docs.text:
When to use Create TM from document pairs.

Input doc_en.txt + doc_es.txt

Tools LF Aligner

Steps Choose files ▸ Language pair ▸ Align

Output aligned.tmx

Pro tip

Enable Google MT hints.

docs.title: _Build_TM_with_OmegaT
docs.text:
When to use Free, cross‑platform TM creation.

Input Folders source/ + target/

Tools OmegaT

Steps New project ▸ Add files ▸ Align

Output project_save.tmx

Pro tip

Split large TMs by domain.

docs.title: Corpora
docs.text: Welcome to the toolkit. Please have a look around on the left or use the search function.

docs.title: Scrape single topic website
docs.text:
When to use Build niche corpus fast.

Input Seed URLs in seeds.txt

Tools requests, BeautifulSoup, readability-lxml

Steps python scrape.py --seeds seeds.txt --depth 1

Output Folder of clean TXT

Pro tip

Respect robots.txt; sleep between hits.

docs.title: Filter Common Crawl with CC Net
docs.text:
When to use Create large clean monolingual corpus.

Input Common Crawl dump list

Tools CC‑Net, fastText

Steps cc_net download ... ▸ cc_net clean ...

Output Deduplicated JSONL

Pro tip

Raise min_len for quality.

docs.title: Sentence align EuroParl with hunalign
docs.text:
When to use Building parallel MT data.

Input EuroParl XML pair

Tools hunalign, EuroParl

Steps Strip XML ▸ hunalign ...

Output aligned.txt

Pro tip

Use dictionary for recall.

docs.title: MT-Evaluation Scenarios
docs.text: Welcome to the toolkit. Please have a look around on the left or use the search function.

docs.title: Evaluate MT with COMET 22
docs.text:
When to use Human‑oriented SOTA metric.

Input src, mt, ref

Tools COMET

Steps comet evaluate ...

Output comet_scores.csv

Pro tip

Bootstrap 95 % CI.

docs.title: NLP
docs.text: Welcome to the toolkit. Please have a look around on the left or use the search function.

docs.title: Cross lingual embeddings with fastText
docs.text:
When to use Compare semantic similarity across languages.

Input Sentence lists

Tools fastText

Steps fasttext print-word-vectors ...

Output vecs.tsv

Pro tip

Use PCA for plotting.

docs.title: Entity extraction with spaCy
docs.text:
When to use Generate terminology seeds.

Input TXT files

Tools spaCy, pandas

Steps Run NER ▸ Save to CSV

Output entities.csv

Pro tip

Filter by POS pattern.

docs.title: PDF
docs.text: Welcome to the toolkit. Please have a look around on the left or use the search function.

docs.title: Bulk download PDFs OCR
docs.text:
When to use Harvest scanned PDFs to text.

Input CSV of PDF URLs

Tools wget, Tesseract OCR, pdfimages, pdftoppm

Steps wget -i links.csv -P pdfs ▸ OCR images

Output ./ocr_text/*.txt

Pro tip

Use --psm 6 for columns.

docs.title: Subtitling
docs.text: Welcome to the toolkit. Pick a workflow from the list on the left or use the search bar. Anything missing? Let me know.

docs.title: Translate subtitles via DeepL MKVToolNix
docs.text:
When to use Quick bilingual subtitles.

Input es.srt

Tools [DeepL plugin](https://github.com/Barefist/

SubtitlesTranslator), MKVToolNix Steps Auto‑translate ▸ Save en.srt ▸ mkvmerge ...

Output MKV with selectable subs

Pro tip

Use --language 0:spa.

docs.title: Harvest bilingual subtitles via OpenSubtitles
docs.text:
When to use Obtain colloquial parallel lines.

Input Movie IDs

Tools OpenSubtitles API, pysrt

Steps Download subs ▸ Align timelines

Output subtitles.jsonl

Pro tip

Filter CPS >20.

docs.title: Auto  subtitle  burn  in  with  FFmpeg
docs.text:
When to use Create bilingual hard‑sub video.

Input video.mp4

Tools Whisper, FFmpeg

Steps Whisper ▸ Translate ▸ ffmpeg ... subtitles=

Output out.mp4

Pro tip

Use -crf 23 to compress.

docs.title: Terminology
docs.text: Welcome to the toolkit. Please have a look around on the left or use the search function.

docs.title: Import terminology Excel → TBX
docs.text:
When to use Need a standards-compliant TBX from a spreadsheet.

Input glossary.xlsx (columns: ID, EN, ES, Definition)

Tools Glossary Converter

Steps

  1. Drag file onto Glossary Converter.
  2. Map columns.
  3. Select TBX-Basic → Convert.

Output glossary.tbx

Pro tip

Tick Generate term IDs if your sheet lacks them.

docs.title: Bulk  clean  glossary  in  Excel  Power  Query
docs.text:
When to use Remove duplicates, trim spaces, unify casing.

Input glossary.xlsx

Tools Excel Power Query

Steps  Data › Get & Transform ▸ “Trim/Clean” ▸ “Remove duplicates”

Output Clean sheet ready for TBX

Pro tip

Record steps so you can refresh with new data.

docs.title: Validate TBX with TBXChecker
docs.text:
When to use Catch malformed XML before publishing.

Input *.tbx

Tools TBXChecker

Steps Open file ▸ Click “Validate”

Output Log of errors/warnings

Pro tip

Fix critical errors first.

docs.title: Convert TBX to SDL MultiTerm
docs.text:
When to use Share a termbase with Trados users.

Input glossary.tbx

Tools SDL MultiTerm Convert

Steps Launch wizard ▸ “TBX‑BASIC” ▸ Finish

Output glossary.sdltb

Pro tip

Stick to UTF‑8 to avoid diacritics issues.

docs.title: Controlling versions of a termbase with Git
docs.text:
When to use Track edits & collaborate asynchronously.

Input *.tbx

Tools Git, Git LFS

Steps git lfs track "*.tbx" ▸ commit ▸ push

Output History with diffs

Pro tip

Use git diff --color-words for readable changes.

docs.title: Forbidden term QA in CAT tools
docs.text:
When to use Enforce branding or regulatory compliance.

Input Translation project

Tools memoQ QA, Trados QA Checker

Steps Add term list ▸ Run QA

Output Violation report

Pro tip

Mark as Critical to block delivery.

docs.title: Extracting term candidates with AntConc
docs.text:
When to use Seed a new termbase.

Input Corpus TXT

Tools AntConc

Steps Set min freq 5 ▸ Export bigrams

Output terms.csv

!!! tip "Pro tip" Filter stop‑words first.

docs.title: Generating terminology with Termostat
docs.text:
When to use Contrastive term extraction.

Input Specialised vs. general corpus

Tools Termostat

Steps Upload corpora ▸ Compute key terms

Output Ranked list

Pro tip

Log‑likelihood is robust.

docs.title: Interactive term frequency dashboard
docs.text:
When to use Stakeholder‑friendly live filtering.

Input term_count.csv

Tools Observable Plot

Steps Upload CSV ▸ Plot.barY

Output Web dashboard

Pro tip

Cache dataset in gist.

docs.title: Video
docs.text: Welcome to the toolkit. Pick a workflow from the list on the left or use the search bar. Anything missing? Let me know.

docs.title: Visualization
docs.text: Welcome to the toolkit. Pick a workflow from the list on the left or use the search bar. Anything missing? Let me know.

docs.title: Visualising frequency lists
docs.text:
When to use Quickly show word clouds.

Input Corpus

Tools Voyant Tools

Steps Upload ▸ “Cirrus”

Output Interactive visual

Pro tip

Export SVG.

docs.title: Sentence similarity heat_map
docs.text:
When to use Track topic drift over series.

Input Sentences list

Tools sentence-transformers, Matplotlib

Steps Encode ▸ Cos matrix ▸ imshow

Output heatmap.png

Pro tip

Cluster reorder for clarity.
